zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，关注关键支撑防守
zh.content:
BTC/USD当前运行于74900美元附近，24小时小幅回落，价格持续受压于20日均线下方，说明短线多头动能有所减弱。整体结构仍处于高位整理阶段，但市场情绪偏谨慎，盘面呈现震荡偏空特征。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持在零轴下方且负值扩大，反映空头动能暂时占优。20日均线位于75660美元附近，已形成阶段性压制。RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格走势判断，短线仍未进入明显超卖区域。

支撑方面，74700美元是当前首个关键防守位，一旦跌破，可能进一步测试74200至73800美元区域。上方阻力首先关注75600美元，其后是76000美元整数关口，若有效突破，将有机会重新打开上涨空间。

交易策略上，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，可等待价格重新站稳20日均线后再考虑顺势做多。激进交易者可关注74700美元附近的反弹机会，但需严格设置止损，避免市场波动放大带来的风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin remains under short-term bearish pressure after slipping below the 20-day moving average near 75,660, with the current price hovering around 74,916. The rejection from the 75,600 region suggests weakening bullish momentum, while the narrow trading range between 74,705 and 75,628 reflects hesitation among market participants. Sellers currently maintain control in the near term, although the broader structure still resembles consolidation rather than a confirmed trend reversal.

The negative MACD reading indicates fading momentum and reinforces the possibility of additional downside if buying volume does not recover soon. Although the RSI value is unavailable, recent price action implies the market is approaching mildly oversold conditions on lower time frames. A sustained move below 74,700 could accelerate bearish sentiment toward the 74,000 psychological zone. Conversely, reclaiming the SMA(20) would improve short-term confidence and potentially attract renewed bullish positioning.

Key support is developing around 74,700, followed by stronger demand near 74,000 and 73,500 if selling intensifies. On the upside, resistance appears at 75,650, closely aligned with the 20-day moving average, while a stronger breakout barrier sits near 76,200. Traders should monitor whether Bitcoin can establish acceptance above the moving average, as this would signal a possible recovery phase. Failure to hold current support levels may invite additional liquidation pressure.

Short-term traders may prefer cautious range-trading strategies until clearer directional confirmation emerges. Aggressive buyers could look for rebound opportunities near established support with tight risk controls, while momentum traders may wait for a decisive close above 75,650 before entering long positions. Bearish setups remain viable below 74,700, particularly if accompanied by increasing volume. Given current volatility and mixed signals, disciplined position sizing and strict stop-loss placement remain essential.
